import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();

import { mockDocuments } from "/src/app/data/documents.ts";
import { PendingOrgDocumentsPanel } from "/src/app/components/PendingOrgDocumentsPanel.tsx";
const mockComments = [

export default function ComplianceManagerDocumentSuite() {
  _s();
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("all");
  const [typeFilter, setTypeFilter] = useState("all");
  const [pillarFilter, setPillarFilter] = useState("all");
  const [careTypeFilter, setCareTypeFilter] = useState("all");
  const [selectedTags, setSelectedTags] = useState([]);
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const [selectedDocument, setSelectedDocument] = useState(null);
  const [showDetailModal, setShowDetailModal] = useState(false);
  const [comments, setComments] = useState(mockComments);
  const [showCommentsPanel, setShowCommentsPanel] = useState(false);
  const [selectedSection, setSelectedSection] = useState(null);
  const [newComment, setNewComment] = useState("");
  const [replyingTo, setReplyingTo] = useState(null);
  const [replyContent, setReplyContent] = useState("");
  const [expandedComments, setExpandedComments] = useState([]);
  const [commentFilter, setCommentFilter] = useState("all");
  const platformDocuments = mockDocuments.filter((doc) => doc.sourceType === "platform");
  const stats = {
    total: platformDocuments.length,
    pending: platformDocuments.filter((d) => d.status === "pending").length,
    needsReview: platformDocuments.filter((d) => d.status === "draft" || d.status === "pending").length,
    published: platformDocuments.filter((d) => d.status === "published").length
  };
  const filteredDocuments = platformDocuments.filter((doc) => {
    if (searchQuery && !doc.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) {
      return false;
    }
    if (statusFilter !== "all" && doc.status !== statusFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (typeFilter !== "all" && doc.documentType !== typeFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (pillarFilter !== "all" && doc.pillar !== pillarFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (careTypeFilter !== "all" && doc.careType !== careTypeFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (selectedTags.length > 0 && !selectedTags.every((tag) => doc.tags.includes(tag))) {
      return false;
    }
    return true;
  });
  const getDocumentIcon = (type) => {
    switch (type) {
      case "policy":
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileText, _fgS: "ckee0", _fgB: 1779104382069, className: "w-4 h-4 text-teal-400", "data-fg-ckee0": "418.236:669.222:/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx:196:16:6186:46:e:FileText::::::B1i5" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx",

          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
      case "procedure":

          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx",
          lineNumber: 218,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
      case "form":
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileSpreadsheet, _fgS: "ckee2", _fgB: 1779104382069, className: "w-4 h-4 text-purple-400", "data-fg-ckee2": "418.236:669.222:/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx:200:16:6356:55:e:FileSpreadsheet::::::EINS" }, void 0, false, {

          lineNumber: 220,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
      case "guideline":
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileCode, _fgS: "ckee3", _fgB: 1779104382069, className: "w-4 h-4 text-amber-400", "data-fg-ckee3": "418.236:669.222:/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx:202:16:6452:47:e:FileCode::::::D8SN" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx",
          lineNumber: 222,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
      default:
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileText, _fgS: "ckee4", _fgB: 1779104382069, className: "w-4 h-4 text-gray-400", "data-fg-ckee4": "418.236:669.222:/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx:204:16:6531:46:e:FileText::::::B1i5" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx",
          lineNumber: 224,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
    }
  };
  const getStatusBadge = (status) => {
    const statusConfig = {
      draft: { bg: "bg-gray-500/20", text: "text-gray-400", label: "Draft" },
      pending: { bg: "bg-yellow-500/20", text: "text-yellow-400", label: "Pending Review" },
      approved: { bg: "bg-blue-500/20", text: "text-blue-400", label: "Approved" },
      published: { bg: "bg-green-500/20", text: "text-green-400", label: "Published" }
    };
    const config = statusConfig[status] || statusConfig.draft;
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "span", _fgS: "ckee5", _fgB: 1779104382069, className: `px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${config.bg} ${config.text}`, "data-fg-ckee5": "418.236:669.222:/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx:217:7:7126:128:e:span:x", children: config.label }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx",
      lineNumber: 237,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this);
  };
  const getRiskBadge = (tags) => {
    const hasHighRisk = tags.some((tag) => tag.toLowerCase().includes("mandatory") || tag.toLowerCase().includes("emergency"));
    if (hasHighRisk) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "span", _fgS: "ckee7", _fgB: 1779104382069, className: "px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-red-500/20 text-red-400", "data-fg-ckee7": "418.236:669.222:/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx:226:14:7475:94:e:span:t", children: "High" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx",
        lineNumber: 246,
        columnNumber: 14
      }, this);
    }
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "span", _fgS: "ckee9", _fgB: 1779104382069, className: "px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-green-500/20 text-green-400", "data-fg-ckee9": "418.236:669.222:/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx:228:12:7588:97:e:span:t", children: "Low" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx",
      lineNumber: 248,
      columnNumber: 12
    }, this);
  };
  const handleSync = () => {
    alert("Syncing with Platform... This will fetch latest updates from Golden Library.");
  };
  const documentComments = selectedDocument ? comments.filter((c) => c.documentId === selectedDocument.id) : [];
  const filteredComments = documentComments.filter((c) => {
    if (commentFilter === "open") return c.status === "open";
    if (commentFilter === "resolved") return c.status === "resolved";
    return true;
  });
  const commentsBySection = filteredComments.reduce((acc, comment) => {
    if (!acc[comment.sectionId]) {
      acc[comment.sectionId] = [];
    }
    acc[comment.sectionId].push(comment);
    return acc;
  }, {});
  const handleAddComment = () => {
    if (!newComment.trim() || !selectedDocument || !selectedSection) return;
    const comment = {
      id: `cmt-${Date.now()}`,
      documentId: selectedDocument.id,
      sectionId: selectedSection,
      sectionTitle: `Section ${selectedSection}`,
      author: "Emma Wilson",
      authorRole: "Compliance Manager",
      content: newComment,
      timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toLocaleString(),
      status: "open",
      replies: []
    };
    setComments([comment, ...comments]);
    setNewComment("");
    setSelectedSection(null);
  };
  const handleAddReply = (commentId) => {
    if (!replyContent.trim()) return;
    setComments(comments.map((c) => {
      if (c.id === commentId) {
        return {
          ...c,
          replies: [
            ...c.replies,
            {
              id: `reply-${Date.now()}`,
              author: "Emma Wilson",
              authorRole: "Compliance Manager",
              content: replyContent,
              timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toLocaleString()
            }
          ]
        };
      }
      return c;
    }));
    setReplyContent("");
    setReplyingTo(null);
  };
  const handleResolveComment = (commentId) => {
    setComments(comments.map(
      (c) => c.id === commentId ? { ...c, status: "resolved" } : c
    ));
  };
  const handleReopenComment = (commentId) => {
    setComments(comments.map(
      (c) => c.id === commentId ? { ...c, status: "open" } : c
    ));
  };
  const toggleCommentExpanded = (commentId) => {
    setExpandedComments(
      (prev) => prev.includes(commentId) ? prev.filter((id) => id !== commentId) : [...prev, commentId]
    );
  };
  const openCommentsCount = documentComments.filter((c) => c.status === "open").length;
  const resolvedCommentsCount = documentComments.filter((c) => c.status === "resolved").length;
  const documentSections = [
    { id: "section-1.1", title: "1.1 Purpose and Objectives" },
    { id: "section-1.2", title: "1.2 Scope and Application" },
    { id: "section-2.1", title: "2.1 Definitions" },
    { id: "section-2.2", title: "2.2 Key Principles" },
    { id: "section-2.3", title: "2.3 Medication Administration Protocol" },
    { id: "section-3.1", title: "3.1 Risk Assessment Procedures" },
    { id: "section-3.2", title: "3.2 Documentation Requirements" },
    { id: "section-4.1", title: "4.1 Staff Responsibilities" },
    { id: "section-4.2", title: "4.2 Incident Reporting" },
    { id: "section-5.1", title: "5.1 Review and Updates" }
  ];

  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/compliance-manager/DocumentSuite.tsx", currentExports);
